channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Wall Street is coming to Consensus Miami — and it’s not just to watch
Stellar’s CMO says crypto must ditch hype and “get rich slow” to win mainstream trust
item.description: Stellar’s new marketing chief says crypto’s future hinges on long-term value creation, not hype cycles or technical jargon.

item.title: Bitcoin's Upside Capped by $82K Sell Wall as UAE’s OPEC Exit Triggers Risk Sell-Off
item.description: Multiple $3.3 million sell walls sit between $80,400 and $82,000 as oil volatility and rising real rates keep Bitcoin trapped.

item.title: Andre Cronje says DeFi is ‘no longer DeFi’ as builders debate circuit breakers
item.description: Flying Tulip’s Andre Cronje says circuit breakers can give teams time to respond during abnormal outflows, while Curve’s Michael Egorov warns they may create new human vulnerabilities.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Litecoin (LTC) gains 2.4%, leading index higher
item.description: Aptos (APT), up 1.7% since Tuesday, joined Aptos (APT) as a top performer.

item.title: XRP set for ‘strongest’ 2026 monthly ETF inflows as bulls target $2
item.description: XRP price technicals are favoring a potential rebound to $2.15 as long as support at $1.40 is held, and institutional demand remains elevated.

item.title: DeFi shaken by $292 million hack, but showing resilience, Standard Chartered says
item.description: The AAVE-led response and new safeguards underscore the sector's maturity as the bank maintains its $2 trillion RWA outlook.

item.title: Securitize, Computershare open path for $70 trillion U.S. stocks to move onchain
item.description: The tie-up between the tokenization specialist and transfer agent giant lets public companies issue blockchain-based shares without changing market structure.

item.title: GSR says Crypto Core3 ETF is simple gateway for mainstream investors
item.description: A new actively managed ETF aims to simplify crypto investing by bundling Bitcoin, Ethereum and Solana into one rebalanced portfolio.

item.title: ZetaChain dismissed bug report that could have prevented $334K exploit
item.description: The vulnerability behind ZetaChain's $334,000 exploit had been reported through its bug bounty program before the attack but was dismissed.

item.title: Galaxy leads $20 million investment in Fence to overhaul back end of $6 trillion credit market
item.description: Startup Fence uses blockchain technology and tokenization in the background to automate processes that many asset managers still rely on manual workflows.

item.title: MoonPay acquires Israeli crypto security firm Sodot in $100 million stock deal
item.description: The acquisition gives MoonPay the security infrastructure for a new institutional business led by former CFTC Acting Chair Caroline Pham.

item.title: First central bank to test bitcoin says asset is ‘too risky’ for reserves
item.description: The Czech Central Bank purchased $1 million in bitcoin in October to run tests and conduct a study and found it is more efficient than stocks and gold but much too risky.

item.title: A tiny group is winning on Polymarket as under 1% of wallets take half the profits
item.description: After research showed a small minority moves prices, new data suggests an even smaller group captures roughly half of all gains.

item.title: Morning Minute: Paul Tudor Jones Calls Bitcoin Strongest Inflation Hedge
item.description: Crypto majors rebound ahead of FOMC, despite oil surging, while Polymarket is making a push to enter the U.S.

item.title: Bitcoin trading volume is falling fast. That rarely ends smoothly.
item.description: What you need to know for April 29, 2026

item.title: Ethereum ICO Whale Who Turned $3,100 Into $23M Wakes Up After a Decade
item.description: A wallet dormant since 2015 just moved 10,000 ETH—but analysts say a custody restructuring, not a sell, is the likely explanation.

item.title: Tether leads Belo's $14 million raise to expand stablecoin payments across Latin America
item.description: Belo, which has over 3 million users across Latin America, offers a digital wallet that lets users hold and transfer local currencies alongside digital dollars.

item.title: Dunamu, Hana Financial take blockchain remittance system live with POSCO
item.description: South Korea's Hana Financial, POSCO International and Upbit operator Dunamu have moved their blockchain remittance system into live trade transactions.

item.title: Bitcoin rebounds from key support as traders eye renewed push toward $80,000
item.description: BTC climbs after holding at the $75,600 support level while derivatives signal de-risking, and speculative flows build in memecoins ahead of tech earnings.

item.title: Polymarket pushes for broader US relaunch with CFTC talks: Report
item.description: Polymarket is reportedly in talks with the CFTC to restore US access after its 2022 settlement, following a limited US rollout in December 2025 focused on sports contracts.

item.title: Mezo unveils institutional bitcoin yield vaults as demand grows to put idle BTC to work
item.description: A new product from Mezo, backed by Anchorage Digital and seeded by Bullish, highlights a broader shift as institutions seek yield on bitcoin without sacrificing custody or control.

item.title: Celsius founder Alex Mashinsky settles FTC case with $10M payment
item.description: The FTC order ties Mashinsky’s $10 million payment to a mostly suspended $4.72 billion judgment that can be revived over asset disclosures.

item.title: Fake Hong Kong stablecoins start trading as real ones remain absent
item.description: Tokens using ‘HKDAP’ and ‘HSBC’ tickers are circulating even as the HKMA says no licensed stablecoins have been issued

item.title: Judge Shoots Down Sam Bankman-Fried's Bid for New Trial
item.description: The judge dismissed the FTX founder’s claims that potential witnesses faced "government threats and retaliation" as "wildly conspiratorial.”

item.title: Canada proposes crypto ATM ban over scams and money laundering
item.description: Ottawa says Bitcoin ATMs have become a key tool for scammers, as regulators move to tighten oversight of high-risk parts of the crypto sector.

item.title: Bitcoin spot volumes across major exchanges have fallen to their lowest levels since October 2023. Such low volume environments often coincide with reduced market depth and heightened sensitivity to flow shifts 📊 glassno.de/4t2fxzK - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE81eHFVaE1LOVd5eWd6RnltYVBFOUJFRDlCY2VPcnZlSGVrU2MtNElJSXIwT3R1TmVsejFvY3c1dFFwdWItUndBcmlVbENTOXZqOG5jb0JzS3QxZWZfSnZn?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin spot volumes across major exch…

item.title: KuCoin EU hires anti-money laundering talent to appease Austrian regulator
item.description: KuCoin was ordered by Austria’s FMA to halt business in the EU because of a shortfall in AML and compliance staff.

item.title: Bitcoin, stocks risk 'months' of losses as Kevin Warsh Becomes Fed chair
item.description: Bitcoin fell after each new Federal Reserve chair began work, data showed, while Kevin Warsh gave mixed signals over policy for risk assets.

item.title: There's a social media groundswell predicting bitcoin above $90,000. That might be a problem.
item.description: The crowd is heavily leaning bullish, and that's often a contrarian signal, according to Santiment.

item.title: Pump.fun has been using all its revenue to burn its token. Now it’s changing course
item.description: The Solana memecoin launchpad will now split revenue evenly between buybacks and operations, replacing a nine-month policy that funneled every dollar into burning PUMP.

item.title: There we go, #Bitcoin bouncing back upwards. FOMC today, GDP tomorrow. Lots of important events are coming up, and markets usually fall ahead of them. The bounce is strong, and it signals more upside from here. On lower timeframes, we see higher lows - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE9uaFM2TGpCakgyQUhKY2NoQ1hNeDlUSGR3ekw3X1gyRmlYeEJHek04TUVMSVlYMDhZMjI0ZmF5WmRTUXlIeWxORWQzTlJoQktVa0ZiOTVVV0xnd0pfUlcybEdSTQ?oc=5" target="_blank">There we go, #Bitcoin bouncing b…

item.title: NO ONE IS TALKING ABOUT THIS When gold topped in 2020, Bitcoin dropped about -21%. Then Bitcoin surged +559% in just 238 days. When Gold topped in January, Bitcoin has also dropped by -33%. Are we seeing the same playbook again? - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE5XRVcwR0hia1NwMzJxdVhrTlp4Nl90MjhSd1MxZlEwdGkzSUtORHFiZ3RsMnVlUEhnaVptVHdWc0ptdFFLdk5ZUVl2NkZqT0J0LWFRTXc3T1FaSDI2RUE4?oc=5" target="_blank">NO ONE IS TALKING ABOUT THIS When gold…

item.title: Polymarket denies data breach, says hacker is selling public data
item.description: The apparent hacker claimed to have breached other prediction markets and planned to release the data in the next few days.

item.title: Aptos says its new privacy coin seeks to fix one of crypto’s biggest trade-offs
item.description: Aptos said its new privacy coin could be used to enable businesses to transact onchain without competitors tracking treasury moves and trading strategies.

item.title: CFTC pulls Wisconsin into fight over prediction market jurisdiction
item.description: The US Commodity Futures Trading Commission has sued Wisconsin in the agency’s fifth lawsuit against a US state to assert jurisdiction over prediction markets.

item.title: Canada proposes ban on crypto ATMs as fraud cases mount
item.description: Canada's Liberal government calls machines a “primary method” for scams as data and law enforcement link them to rising losses

item.title: 🔥 BIG: Michael Saylor says the endgame is to drive Bitcoin to $10M a coin and make Bitcoin a $200T network until it grows higher. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBmQmp6ZWJFYVNRT1N6S1pac21YNVB5c2hFRkcxVHZSRGFpUGRaMVFVdjRCbW4xbF9uMW1NZHZYZDduS09Ga3N2WGQwUzJheFhWbHg2OGRPYkM5bHJhb3Y3U3Jya1A?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 BIG: Michael Saylor says the…

item.title: XRP falls to $1.38 after breaking below $1.40 on rising selling pressure
item.description: High-volume move flips support into resistance, leaving price stuck at a key decision level.

item.title: Robinhood dips as Q1 earnings miss and crypto revenue, volume fall nearly 50%
item.description: Robinhood’s Q1 earnings per share and revenue figures missed industry expectations, sending the company’s shares down nearly 10%.

item.title: Bitcoin’s recent rally is largely fueled by Strategy purchases: Bitwise's Hougan
item.description: While Bitcoin exchange-traded funds and whale buying have contributed to the recent Bitcoin rally, the key driver has been consistent buying by Michael Saylor's treasury firm, Strategy, according to Bitwise's chief investment officer.

item.title: 🚨 LATEST: Trump-backed World Liberty Financial partnered with a crypto project linked to a US-sanctioned scam-ring operators, per WSJ. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE1uZWtLWk4tdzNjYXNjQ0NNTi15amM0VWV6TEd3eEhTLXBkbnlVdlpyc3ZUakVhVlV4ZjlxQ1FaZ3JzLXZrRHlyclhVSGhmMktqMmF5dVFqLUhSd2wwbkM0OG1BUFQ?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 LATEST: Trump-backed World L…

item.title: Judge rejects new trial for former FTX CEO Sam Bankman-Fried
item.description: A federal judge slammed Sam Bankman-Fried’s request for a new trial as seemingly “a plan to rescue his reputation,” denying the former FTX boss’s request.

item.title: ⚡️ NOW: CZ says, “agentic money = blockchain”. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE90dDBBR1ZzSGdkMmc1Ym5iUDNqVlprLWU5S25wcU9MdUNqNzVNY1prMDZZX3ZTeTVpTVE0QU4xWl9RcGxwdUJkT2pDamdYRnJLdUNuVjJlSUJfVTZyTHQwUjQzaW8?oc=5" target="_blank">⚡️ NOW: CZ says, “agentic money…

item.title: The Treasury Department, through Economic Fury, has targeted Iran’s international shadow banking infrastructure, access to crypto, shadow fleet, weapons procurement networks, funding for terrorist proxies in the region, and independent Chinese “teapot” refi - x.com

item.title: Allocation Update - Q1 2026
item.description: Q1 2026 continued our focus on strengthening Ethereum’s foundations, with sustained investment in core domains like cryptography, zero-knowledge proofs, security, and protocol research. See the list below of the projects and ecosystem effo…

item.title: Bitcoin rally falters as AI industry weakens and CLARITY Act approval odds fall
item.description: Bitcoin’s dip below $76,000 was driven by an AI sector sell-off and investors’ worries about slowed progress in the CLARITY Act negotiations.

item.title: Australia’s Crypto Crossroads: Regulation is Here, Now Comes the Hard Part
item.description: TL;DR Australian exchanges should not treat April 2027 as the first compliance date. AUSTRAC obligations and readiness expectations are already… The post Australia’s Crypto Crossroads: Regulation is Here, Now Comes the Hard Part appeared f…

item.title: AI Agent Deletes Startup’s Database in 9 Seconds, Founder Says
item.description: PocketOS founder Jeremy Crane claims a Cursor agent running Claude Opus wiped production data and backups through a single Railway API call.

item.title: Woman Gets 71 Months in Prison Over Bitcoin Investment Fraud Targeting Elderly Victims
item.description: Federal prosecutors secured a prison term for a Saipan woman who defrauded elderly victims through a fake Bitcoin investment scheme

item.title: OpenClaw Insider Builds the Enterprise Safety Layer the Project Never Shipped
item.description: Red Hat principal engineer and OpenClaw maintainer Sally O'Malley released Tank OS—a tool that sandboxes AI agents in isolated containers, keeping credentials locked and agents from interfering with each other or the host machine.

item.title: CFTC Backs Prediction Markets in Yet Another Lawsuit Against a State
item.description: CFTC Chair Mike Selig has vowed to sue any state that attempts to regulate prediction markets under its own gambling laws.

item.title: I want to be honest about where we're at. most crypto companies have trended to zero. most of the names you saw at the top last cycle aren't even building anymore. we've taken our share of hits too - endless FUD, a hack, numerous market pullbacks. and yet p - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTFBRSGlwakJuM1NMMU41TmdwS1VGc3dJeHdVZGN4ZjV6ZU9relpUMjJhdlBFNHF0aGdiR3hLVFJGRGZLeHJsQVZDcjBwcWN2MUJXRmtNTUM0dWhqSFU?oc=5" target="_blank">I want to be honest about where we're at. m…

item.title: Dead Internet? A Third of New Websites Are AI-Generated, Says Stanford
item.description: A Stanford-led study quantified what everyone already suspected—but the findings aren't quite what people expected.

item.title: Robinhood Shares Slide on 34% Decrease in Crypto Revenue
item.description: Retail brokerage Robinhood's business has gotten a boost from prediction markets, though its crypto trading revenue fell in Q1.

item.title: Google DeepMind Veteran Raises $1.1 Billion to Build AI That Isn’t Trained With Human Data
item.description: Ineffable Intelligence is betting that reinforcement learning is the path to superintelligence, rather than AI's large language models.

item.title: Bitcoin Coinbase Premium turns negative as BTC price drops, weekly losses top $829M
item.description: Bitcoin price followed weakening US spot market demand as the Coinbase Premium Index turned negative for the first time in three weeks.

item.title: RedStone launches settlement layer to address RWA liquidity gap in DeFi lending
item.description: A new system targets the mismatch between fast DeFi liquidations and slow asset redemptions, a key barrier to the use of tokenized assets in lending markets.

item.title: Soldier Charged in Polymarket Insider Trading Case Pleads Not Guilty
item.description: Special forces member Gannon Ken Van Dyke allegedly used inside knowledge of a Venezuelan military operation to make nearly $400K profit on Polymarket.
